blocks.content: January. The USC acceptance came on a Wednesday.
Kit stared at the email for a long time. Then he printed it out, folded it, and put it in the drawer of his nightstand. He needed a minute to let it be real before it became a conversation.
She sat down at the kitchen table. Looked at the email he'd set in front of her. Then she looked at him.

blocks.speaker: Kit's Mom
blocks.content: I mean it. Is this what you want? Because we can talk about money, we can figure that out. I just need to know if it's real.
She looked at the email again. He watched her read it — really read it — and then she did something he hadn't expected. She reached across the table and put her hand over his.
He folded the email back up. Put it in his pocket. He'd tell her. He just needed to figure out what he was going to say around it first.
